title: List of parasitic organisms
content: This is an "incomplete list" of organisms that are true parasites upon other organisms. Endoparasites. Parasitic worm s. These can be categorized into three groups; cestode s, nematode s and trematode s. Examples include: Ectoparasites. Monogeneans. Monogenea ns are flatworm s, generally ectoparasites on fish.
